narrative:
Munroe Falls 2-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,229 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.1 percentage points.
